text:
Michiro (ミチロウ, Michirō) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 208) is a player of the game Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 153 

Appearance

Michiro has fair hair parted to the right, thin eyebrows, and a bulb-shaped nose. He wears a vest and a long-sleeved shirt underneath, plain pants, and shoes. 

Personality

Michiro is sneaky and thought that he could trick Gon and Killua by trading them a fake "Favor Cushion" card. Still, when confronted about the fake, he becomes nervous and gives the boys a genuine one. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Michiro trades a fake "Favor Cushion" card with Gon, but it is exposed by Gon's Paladin's Necklace. In light of this, Michiro then gives Gon a genuine "Favor Cushion". 

Michiro's name is mentioned in Gon's binder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Michiro is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Michiro's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
